arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Konrad Laimer is overjoyed at “fun” UCL victory over Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s winless streak against Bayer Leverkusen had to snap at some point in time and it finally did with a resounding 3-0 victory in the Champions League over Die Werkself . “Every win is fun, especially in clashes like this — it creates good spirits,” the Austrian said after the match, as captured by @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: 5 takeaways from Bayern Munich's's first-leg win over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League last 16
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goal machine Harry Kane may have been experiencing what some called a drought heading into the clash with Leverkusen - he hadn't struck in four matches in all competitions (three in the Bundesliga and one in the Champions League) - but the England captain proved that he has lost nothing of his almost preternatural goal-scoring instincts. This season has seen champions Bayer Leverkusen engaged in a fascinating duel with record champions Bayern Munich, with the latest instalment the 3-0 home win for the Bavarians in the Champions League Last 16 first leg on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich to Arsenal: Bayern Munich contract prediction made as Mikel Arteta receives transfer warning
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts warns Gooners not to get too excited about the prospect of the North London giants signing Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich on a free transfer.

Never since the introduction of three-points-for-a-win in 1995/96 have the leaders blown an eight-point advantage at this stage of the season. Bochum are much improved of late under ex-Wolfsburg head...
